nodes.label: AI as identification tool for verifiable tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI for unverifiable or high-stakes tasks

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness based on training data quality

nodes.grounding_span: AI is only as good as the information it is trained on

nodes.label: AI as validation-seeking tool
nodes.grounding_span: AI is also to willing to please users, so you can convince them eventually to agree with anything

nodes.label: AI use in education for problem-solving
nodes.label_negative: AI use that bypasses learning and critical thinking
nodes.grounding_span: Kids need to get comfortable with not knowing the answer and just try some thing instead

nodes.label: Skeptical but appreciative of AI technology
